subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto her who hath believed in her Lord and was among the devoted ones in a Tablet of mighty glory. Blessed is she [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی التی آمنت بربها و کانت من القانتات فی لوح عز عظیم طوبی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God, @power of prayer, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
